security.csp: default-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' asset: data:; connect-src ipc: http://ipc.localhost https://github.com https://api.github.com

bundle.shortDescription: Combine two-channel Kia dashcam AVI recordings
bundle.longDescription: Recursively finds two-channel Kia dashcam AVI recordings, stacks both camera channels, stitches the sequence, and compresses the result to H.265.
